_comment: Opcode whitelist for OMS rediscovery. v2c/c2v are the only fields read by load_op_filter(); _comment is ignored. Ops match the hand-coded OMS in pushgp_ldpc/adapter.py (C2V uses compact sign+mul form, 13 ops). Ground truth: fit=-3.1731 at A=176 E=352 SNRs=[2,3,4] n_frames=20 max_iter=8 (verify_oms_rediscover_target.py). K1=10 already matches K1=1e6 BER -- default RAND_LOG_CONST_MAX=1.0 is sufficient.
